revision.comment: Bot: mark 3 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:安倍有世]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1327|death_date={{death date|1405|2|28}}|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}}}
{{Infobox noble | name = Abe Ariyo | image = | caption = | period = {{ill|Northern and Southern Courts period (disambiguation)|en|Northern and Southern Courts period (disambiguation)|qid=Q8140349|lt=Nanboku-chō period|1=Northern and Southern Courts period (disambiguation)}} – Early {{ill|Muromachi period|en|Muromachi period|qid=Q334845|lt=Muromachi period|1=Muromachi period}} | birth_date = {{ill|Karyaku|en|Karyaku|qid=Q1327198|lt=Karyaku|1=Karyaku}} 2 ({{ill|1327|en|1327|qid=Q5792|lt=1327|1=1327}}) | death_date = {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 12, {{ill|January 29|en|January 29|qid=Q2286|lt=January 29 (old calendar)|1=January 29}} ({{ill|1405|en|1405|qid=Q6124|lt=1405|1=1405}} {{ill|February 28|en|February 28|qid=Q2362|lt=February 28|1=February 28}}) | Rank = {{ill|Juni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Juni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Juni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Gyōbu-kyō|ja|刑部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gyōbu-kyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gyōbu-kyō|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=刑部省|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=刑部省|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=刑部省|1=Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6867320}} | lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Kōgon|en|Emperor Go-Kōgon|qid=Q555465|lt=Emperor Go-Kōgon|1=Emperor Go-Kōgon}}, {{ill|Emperor Go-En'yū|en|Emperor Go-En'yū|qid=Q471799|lt=Emperor Go-En'yū|1=Emperor Go-En'yū}}, {{ill|Emperor Go-Komatsu|en|Emperor Go-Komatsu|qid=Q123052|lt=Emperor Go-Komatsu|1=Emperor Go-Komatsu}} | family = {{ill|Abe clan|ja|安倍氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe clan|qq=}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Abe Yasukichi|ja|安倍泰吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Yasukichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Yasukichi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500608}} | siblings = Unknown | spouse = Unknown | children = {{ill|Abe Arimori|ja|安倍有盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Arimori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Arimori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500611}}, {{ill|Abe Arishige|ja|安倍有重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Arishige|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500613}} }} '''Abe Ariyo''' (安倍 有世) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|qid=Q2274163|lt=Onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} who lived during the {{ill|Northern and Southern Courts period (disambiguation)|en|Northern and Southern Courts period (disambiguation)|qid=Q8140349|lt=Nanboku-chō period|1=Northern and Southern Courts period (disambiguation)}} and early {{ill|Muromachi period|en|Muromachi period|qid=Q334845|lt=Muromachi period|1=Muromachi period}}. He was the 14th-generation descendant of {{ill|Abe no Seimei|en|Abe no Seimei|qid=Q1150151|lt=Abe no Seimei|1=Abe no Seimei}}. Ariyo became the first Onmyōji to rise to the Rank of court noble, laying the groundwork for the future prominence of the {{ill|Tsuchimikado clan|lt=Tsuchimikado clan|lt=Tsuchimikado family|ja|土御門家 (安倍氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado family|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado family|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=阿倍氏|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=阿倍氏|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=阿倍氏}}. == Biography == Born in {{ill|Karyaku|en|Karyaku|qid=Q1327198|lt=Karyaku|1=Karyaku}} 2 ({{ill|1327|en|1327|qid=Q5792|lt=1327|1=1327}}) as the son of {{ill|Abe Yasukichi|ja|安倍泰吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Yasukichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Yasukichi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500608}}, Ariyo distinguished himself early as a skilled practitioner of {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|qid=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō|1=Onmyōdō}}. At the time, various branches of the {{ill|Abe clan|ja|安倍氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe clan|qq=}} were competing to claim the title of "main lineage" of the Abe family. In {{ill|Kōei|en|Kōei|qid=Q980266|lt=Kōei|1=Kōei}} 3 ({{ill|1344|en|1344|qid=Q6073|lt=1344|1=1344}}), Ariyo assumed the position of {{ill|Ōi no Gon no Suke|ja|大炊権頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōi no Gon no Suke|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōi no Gon no Suke|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, marking the beginning of his administrative career. In {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 9/{{ill|Bunna|en|Bunna|qid=Q1146252|lt=Bunwa|1=Bunna}} 3 ({{ill|1354|en|1354|qid=Q6118|lt=1354|1=1354}}), he supervised the ancient {{ill|Kishimai|ja|吉志舞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishimai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishimai|qq=}} ritual during the {{ill|Daijosai|en|Daijosai|qid=Q11433653|lt=Daijōsai|1=Daijosai}} of Emperor Go-Kōgon. Despite opposition from rival Abe clans, Ariyo's skill established him as a leading figure in Onmyōdō. In {{ill|Bunna|en|Bunna|qid=Q1146252|lt=Bunwa|1=Bunna}} 4 ({{ill|1355|en|1355|qid=Q6123|lt=1355|1=1355}}), Ariyo was appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}} but resigned three years later due to intra-clan conflicts. He continued to serve in other roles, including {{ill|Sakyō no Daibu|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakyō no Daibu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakyō no Daibu|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=京職|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=京職|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11374719}}, honing his expertise in astrology and divination. In {{ill|Tianshou|en|Tianshou|qid=Q10939676|lt=Tenju|1=Tianshou}} 4/{{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11131293}} 4 ({{ill|1378|en|1378|qid=Q6306|lt=1378|1=1378}}), Ariyo gained the favor of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|en|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|qid=Q248381|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu}}, the third {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}}, after a successful prayer ritual. Yoshimitsu entrusted him with various spiritual and political responsibilities, elevating Ariyo's influence within both the imperial court and the shogunate. In {{ill|Kakei|ja|嘉慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakei|1=Kakēi (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11419403}} 1 ({{ill|1387|en|1387|qid=Q6359|lt=1387|1=1387}}), Ariyo was promoted to {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Gyōbu-kyō|ja|刑部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gyōbu-kyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gyōbu-kyō|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=刑部省|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=刑部省|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=刑部省|1=Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6867320}}. By {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 6 ({{ill|1399|en|1399|qid=Q6422|lt=1399|1=1399}}), he had risen to {{ill|Juni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Juni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Juni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}}, the highest Rank ever achieved by an Onmyōji. Ariyo passed away on {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 12, {{ill|January 29|en|January 29|qid=Q2286|lt=January 29 (old calendar)|1=January 29}} ({{ill|1405|en|1405|qid=Q6124|lt=1405|1=1405}} {{ill|February 28|en|February 28|qid=Q2362|lt=February 28|1=February 28}}), at the age of 79. His legacy as a master of Onmyōdō endured, with his name becoming synonymous with excellence in the field. == Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Abe Yasukichi|ja|安倍泰吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Yasukichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Yasukichi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500608}} * Mother: Unknown * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Abe Arimori|ja|安倍有盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Arimori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Arimori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500611}} (?-1433), formerly known as Yasukei ** {{ill|Abe Arishige|ja|安倍有重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Arishige|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500613}}, formerly known as Arinaka == References == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=Masamune Atsuo|title=Shoke Den|publisher=Japanese Classical Texts Publishing Society|year=1940|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|安倍有世|version=92572325|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:安倍有世]]
